memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:5:10.snippet: - Workspace repo was initialized/snapshotted and pushed to GitHub remote https://github.com/shishkosv/phylosophers with commits including 2fe4913, 46c6af4, and ff1843e. - Investigated Telegram native reply behavior: prompts and routing now emit [[reply_to_current]], but evidence suggests the remaining issue is in OpenClaw transport/runtime, not persona config. Found existing reply support in OpenClaw payload/runtime/Telegram send path, suggesting a narrow transport-layer issue. - User asked for debug observability logs plus a cleanup script/timer every 3 hours; approval was given for both, but runtime patching is blocked from this workspace because installed OpenClaw files under ~/.npm-globa
